From Our Kitchen

Featured Dishes

Veg

Jimbu Thakali Set (Veg)

Rs. 650

Traditional Thakali meal with rice, dal, seasonal vegetables, pickle, and papad served on a brass plate

Jimbu Thakali Set (Chicken)

Rs. 850

Complete Thakali set with tender chicken curry, rice, dal, vegetables, and traditional accompaniments

Chef's Special Lamb Shank

Rs. 1450

Slow-braised lamb shank in aromatic Himalayan spices, served with saffron rice

Chicken Momo (Steam)

Rs. 350

Juicy chicken dumplings steamed to perfection, served with spicy tomato achar

Spicy

Buff Momo (Fried)

Rs. 380

Crispy fried buffalo meat momos with signature jhol achar

Chicken Thukpa

Rs. 420

Hearty Tibetan noodle soup with tender chicken and fresh vegetables

15+Years of Excellence
Our Story

A Taste of the Himalayas

Nestled in the heart of Kathmandu, Thak Khola Kitchen brings the authentic flavors of the Mustang region to your table. Our recipes have been passed down through generations, preserving the rich culinary heritage of the Thakali people.

Every dish tells a story of the mountains, crafted with locally sourced ingredients and prepared with techniques perfected over centuries. Experience the warmth of Nepali hospitality in every bite.

50+Signature Dishes
10k+Happy Guests
4.9Star Rating
Testimonials

What Our Guests Say

"The best Thakali food outside of Nepal! The ambiance is incredible and the service is impeccable."

Sarah M.

"Authentic flavors that remind me of home. The Jimbu Thakali Set is a must-try!"

Raj K.

"A hidden gem! The momos are perfectly crafted and the cocktails are creative and delicious."

Emily L.
